extDescription.message: Summarize the current page with Doubao, DeepSeek, Ollama, and more in one click.

popupOpenSidePanelButton.message: Summarize current page in side panel

popupErrorCannotGetPageUrl.message: Unable to get the current page URL. Switch to a regular webpage and try again.

popupReadyMessage.message: ✅ Ready. Close this popup, then click the extension icon again. The side panel will open automatically and summarize the current page.

sidepanelChatHint.message: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

sidepanelPromptSummarizeFirst.message: Please click “Summarize current page” before asking questions.

sidepanelOllamaConnectShort.message: Unable to connect to the Ollama service. Please make sure Ollama is running.

sidepanelCannotGetPageInfo.message: Unable to get the current page information. Switch to a regular webpage and try again.

sidepanelRestrictedPageCannotRead.message: This is a restricted page and its content cannot be read. Please use this feature on a regular webpage.

sidepanelCannotExtractContent.message: Unable to extract page content. Make sure the current page contains readable text.

sidepanelOllamaConnectLong.message:
Unable to connect to the Ollama service. Please check:
1. Whether Ollama is running (ollama serve)
2. Whether the OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* environment variable is set before startup
   Windows: set OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* then run ollama serve
   Mac/Linux: OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* ollama serve

sidepanelSummaryModeSystemPrompt.message: You are a professional content analysis assistant who is good at quickly summarizing the key points of webpages. Always reply in the current UI language, which is English.

sidepanelSummaryModeUserPrompt.message:
Please always summarize the following webpage in the current UI language, which is English. Requirements:
1. Capture the main idea accurately and do not drift away from the source
2. Preserve important data, conclusions, dates, and named entities
3. Do not switch to another language unless a source term must be preserved
4. Strictly follow this required output structure and do not add extra sections: $4

Page title: $1
Page URL: $2

Page content:
$3

sidepanelSummaryStyleCompact.message: Use the Compact style with this exact structure: first write exactly 1 sentence for the main idea; then write exactly 3 bullet points, each limited to 1 sentence; do not add background, process details, extended analysis, or a closing paragraph.

sidepanelSummaryStyleStandard.message: Use the Standard style with this exact structure: first write 1 sentence for the main idea; then write exactly 4 bullet points, each 1-2 sentences; if there is key data or a conclusion, place it directly in the relevant bullet; do not add extra sections.

sidepanelSummaryStyleDetailed.message: Use the Detailed style with this exact structure: output 5 sections in this order: [Main Idea], [Background], [Key Information], [Risks/Limitations], [Conclusion]; each section should contain 1-3 sentences; if the source does not mention risks or limitations, explicitly say that no obvious risks or limitations are mentioned.

sidepanelFollowupPageSystemPrompt.message:
You are a professional content analysis assistant. The user is viewing a webpage and you have already summarized it. The user may now ask follow-up questions about this page. Answer based on the webpage content below, and always reply in the current UI language, which is English. If a question goes beyond the page content, you may use your own knowledge, but clearly state which parts come from the page and which parts are your additions.

Page title: $1
Page URL: $2

Page content:
$3

sidepanelFollowupSelectionSystemPrompt.message:
You are a professional content analysis assistant. The user selected a passage on a webpage and you have already summarized it. The user may now ask follow-up questions about this content. Answer based on the content below, and always reply in the current UI language, which is English. If a question goes beyond the selected content, you may use your own knowledge, but clearly state which parts come from the selected content and which parts are your additions.

Page title: $1
Page URL: $2

Selected content:
$3

sidepanelApiKeyMissing.message: Please configure the API key for $1 on the settings page first.

sidepanelBackgroundDisconnected.message: The background connection was disconnected. Please try again.

sidepanelCannotConnectBackground.message: Unable to connect to the background service

optionsPageDescription.message: Use tabs, grouped cards, and collapsible panels to manage local models, online models, and diagnostics more efficiently.

optionsSummaryStyleHint.message: Each preset now uses a fixed template: Compact = 1 main sentence + 3 bullets; Standard = 1 main sentence + 4 bullets; Detailed = Main Idea / Background / Key Information / Risks or Limitations / Conclusion.

optionsSummaryStyleCompactHint.message: 1 main sentence + 3 bullets for fast scanning.

optionsSummaryStyleStandardHint.message: 1 main sentence + 4 bullets with balanced detail.

optionsSummaryStyleDetailedHint.message: Five sections: Main Idea / Background / Key Information / Risks or Limitations / Conclusion.

optionsGroupLocalHint.message: Manage models running on your local machine or LAN service.

optionsGroupOnlineHint.message: Manage API keys and model names for hosted models in one place.

optionsEmptyState.message: No matching providers or settings were found.

optionsNetworkDiagnosticsHint.message: Diagnostics use the browser's current network path and proxy settings to check reachability for each provider.

optionsNetworkDiagnosticsRunning.message: ⏳ Checking network reachability for all providers...

optionsNetworkDiagnosticsSummary.message: This run found $1 reachable providers and $2 unreachable providers.

optionsNetworkDiagnosticsUnreachable.message: This endpoint could not be reached through the browser's current network path.

optionsNetworkDiagnosticsInvalidUrl.message: Invalid URL format. Check the current configuration first.

optionsAboutSubtitle.message: View the repository links, current version, project notes, usage help, and the latest release summary for version 1.1.0.

optionsAboutIntroItem1.message: Supports full-page summaries, selected-text summaries, and multi-turn follow-up chat in the side panel.

optionsAboutIntroItem2.message: Works with both hosted and local models so you can switch based on your scenario.

optionsAboutIntroItem3.message: The settings page includes connection tests, model refresh actions, and network diagnostics.

optionsAboutQuickStartItem1.message: Finish configuration in the Local models or Online models tab and save your settings first.

optionsAboutQuickStartItem2.message: Open the side panel and click Summarize current page to generate the first summary.

optionsAboutQuickStartItem3.message: If something cannot connect, check the provider state in Network diagnostics first.

optionsAboutHelpGithubIssues.message: GitHub Issues: bug reports and feature requests

optionsAboutHelpGiteeIssues.message: Gitee Issues: feedback entry for users in mainland China

optionsAboutHelpItem1.message: For first-time use, finish model configuration in Settings before opening the side panel to summarize a page.

optionsAboutHelpItem2.message: If a connection fails, use Network diagnostics first to check local and hosted provider reachability.

optionsAboutDescriptionBody.message: AI Page Summarizer supports full-page summaries, selected-text summaries, and multi-turn side panel chat. It works with hosted providers such as DeepSeek, OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, ai.td.ee, GitHub Copilot, Doubao, and Gitee AI, plus local providers such as Ollama, Docker Desktop AI, Foundry Local, and KoboldCpp. Version 1.1.0 focuses on the unified settings UI, network diagnostics, and quicker side panel controls.

optionsAboutChangelogItem1.message: 1.1.0: The settings page is now organized around local models, online models, network diagnostics, summary style, and about content with a unified header and card layout.

optionsAboutChangelogItem2.message: 1.1.0: Network diagnostics now shows richer per-provider states, handles request failures more gracefully, and avoids uncaught errors interrupting the page.

optionsAboutChangelogItem3.message: 1.1.0: The side panel adds collapsible quick settings, model-status pills, and availability colors. Version 1.0.0 was the initial public release.

optionsTestHintLocal.message: Test whether the local service is reachable and the model list can be loaded.

optionsTestHintOnline.message: Verify whether the current API key and model can reach the remote service.

optionsTestMissingConfig.message: Please fill in the API key and model before testing.

optionsHintOpenAIHtml.message: Get it from the OpenAI dashboard.

optionsHintOpenAIModel.message: Choose a GPT model from the dropdown, such as gpt-4.1-mini.

optionsHintGeminiHtml.message: Get it from Google AI Studio.

optionsHintGeminiModel.message: Choose a Gemini model from the dropdown, such as gemini-2.0-flash.

optionsHintAnthropicHtml.message: Get it from the Anthropic Console.

optionsHintAnthropicModel.message: Choose a Claude model from the dropdown, such as claude-3-5-sonnet-latest.

optionsHintAiTdEeHtml.message: Get it from the ai.td.ee dashboard.

optionsHintAiTdEeModel.message: After entering your API key, click Refresh to load the available model IDs from ai.td.ee.

optionsHintDeepSeekHtml.message: Get it from the DeepSeek Open Platform.

optionsHintGiteeKeyHtml.message: Get it from the Gitee AI Console.

optionsHintGiteeModel.message: Choose a model from the dropdown, such as Qwen3-8B.

optionsHintGitHubCopilotHtml.message: Use a GitHub Personal Access Token with the GitHub Models compatible endpoint.

optionsHintGitHubCopilotShort.message: Use a GitHub PAT with the GitHub Models compatible inference endpoint.

optionsHintGitHubCopilotModel.message: Choose a GitHub Models model ID from the dropdown, such as openai/gpt-4.1-mini.

optionsHintDoubaoHtml.message: Get it from the Volcengine Ark Console.

optionsHintDoubaoModel.message: Choose a model or endpoint ID from the dropdown.
